definition: Committed facility amount divided by collateral value, expressed as a percentage. Measures the degree of leverage on a secured facility. A key underwriting and ongoing monitoring KPI for secured lending, required in FR Y-14Q CRE Schedule and OCC Comptroller's Handbook. Higher LTV indicates greater loss severity risk if the borrower defaults and collateral must be liquidated.
insight: Committed facility amount divided by collateral value, expressed as a percentage

ingredient_fields.description: Individual exposure identifier — finest grain in the data model
FK linking each position to its parent facility
Outstanding balance of the individual position/exposure
Primary key — grain of facility-level calculation
Total authorized credit line — the committed limit
Raw collateral value (pre-haircut) as of the snapshot date
FK to counterparty — grouping key for counterparty-level rollup
FK to enterprise_business_taxonomy — desk/portfolio/business segment resolution
Hierarchy node ID — links facility to organizational segment
Self-referential FK — traverses L3->L2->L1 hierarchy
Hierarchy depth (1=Business Segment, 2=Portfolio, 3=Desk)
Human-readable name of the desk/portfolio/business segment

level_definitions.level_logic: For each DISTINCT(facility_id) THEN [committed_facility_amt] / [collateral_value] x 100
For each [counterparty_id] THEN lookup [facility_id] WHERE IS([counterparty_id]). For each [facility_id]: SUM(committed_facility_amt) / SUM(collateral_value) x 100

For each [L3 Business Segment], lookup [lob_segment_id] from enterprise_business_taxonomy WHERE [tree_level]='L3' AND [segment_name]=[L3 Business Segment], THEN lookup [facility_id] in facility_master WHERE IS([lob_segment_id]). For each [facility_id]: SUM(committed_facility_amt) / SUM(collateral_value) x 100

source_references.description: FK to Business Segment taxonomy — desk resolution
Business Segment hierarchy node — L3 leaf segment

level_definitions.level_logic: For each [L2 Business Segment], lookup [lob_segment_id] from enterprise_business_taxonomy WHERE [tree_level]='L2' AND [segment_name]=[L2 Business Segment], THEN lookup [facility_id] in facility_master WHERE IS([lob_segment_id]) — including all child L3 segments via parent_segment_id traversal. For each [facility_id]: SUM(committed_facility_amt) / SUM(collateral_value) x 100

source_references.description: Business Segment hierarchy node — L2 parent segment
Self-referential FK — traverse up from L3 to L2

level_definitions.level_logic: For each [L1 Business Segment], lookup [lob_segment_id] from enterprise_business_taxonomy WHERE [tree_level]='L1' AND [segment_name]=[L1 Business Segment], THEN lookup [facility_id] in facility_master WHERE IS([lob_segment_id]) — including all descendant L2/L3 segments via recursive parent_segment_id traversal. For each [facility_id]: SUM(committed_facility_amt) / SUM(collateral_value) x 100

source_references.description: Business Segment hierarchy node — L1 root segment
Self-referential FK — recursive traversal to collect all descendants

definition: Estimated credit exposure if the counterparty defaults. For drawn facilities: outstanding balance. For undrawn: drawn + CCF * (committed - drawn). Fundamental input to Expected Loss (EL = PD x LGD x EAD) and regulatory capital calculations under Basel III IRB.
insight: Estimated credit exposure if the counterparty defaults

ingredient_fields.description: Current drawn balance
Undrawn commitment amount
Total authorized credit line
Credit conversion factor for undrawn exposure
FK to counterparty
FK to enterprise_business_taxonomy

level_definitions.level_logic: For each DISTINCT(facility_id) THEN [drawn_amount] + [ccf] * ([committed_facility_amt] - [drawn_amount])
For each [counterparty_id] THEN SUM(facility.ead) WHERE IS([counterparty_id])
For each [L3 Business Segment], lookup [lob_segment_id] from enterprise_business_taxonomy WHERE [tree_level]='L3'. SUM(facility.ead) for all facilities WHERE IS([lob_segment_id])
For each [L2 Business Segment], SUM(facility.ead) for all facilities under L2 segment including all child L3 segments via parent_segment_id traversal
For each [L1 Business Segment], SUM(facility.ead) for all facilities under L1 department including all descendant L2/L3 segments via recursive parent_segment_id traversal

definition: Net Operating Income (NOI) or EBITDA divided by total debt service obligations. Measures borrower's ability to service debt from operating cash flow. Core CRE underwriting KPI — values below 1.0x indicate insufficient cash flow. Required in FR Y-14Q and CCAR stress testing.
insight: Net Operating Income (NOI) or EBITDA divided by total debt service obligations

ingredient_fields.description: Net operating income — numerator for CRE facilities
EBITDA — numerator for C&I and Project Finance facilities
Annual total debt service
Gross exposure — weighting basis for rollup
FK to enterprise_product_taxonomy — determines CRE vs C&I product classification
Product type code (CRE, CI, PF) — drives numerator selection (NOI vs EBITDA)
FK to counterparty
FK to enterprise_business_taxonomy

level_definitions.level_logic: For each DISTINCT(facility_id) THEN lookup [product_node_id] in facility_master, join enterprise_product_taxonomy to resolve [product_code]. IF product_code IN ('CRE') THEN [noi_amt] / [total_debt_service_amt] from facility_financial_snapshot. IF product_code IN ('CI','PF') THEN [ebitda_amt] / [total_debt_service_amt] from facility_financial_snapshot.

For each [counterparty_id] THEN lookup [facility_id] in facility_master WHERE IS([counterparty_id]). For each [facility_id]: compute facility-level DSCR (CRE: noi_amt, C&I/PF: ebitda_amt / total_debt_service_amt). Weighted average: SUM(facility.dscr * facility.gross_exposure_usd) / SUM(facility.gross_exposure_usd)

For each [L3 Business Segment], lookup [lob_segment_id] from enterprise_business_taxonomy WHERE [tree_level]='L3' AND [segment_name]=[L3 Business Segment], THEN lookup [facility_id] in facility_master WHERE IS([lob_segment_id]). For each [facility_id]: compute facility-level DSCR (CRE: noi_amt, C&I/PF: ebitda_amt / total_debt_service_amt). Weighted average: SUM(facility.dscr * facility.gross_exposure_usd) / SUM(facility.gross_exposure_usd)

For each [L2 Business Segment], lookup [lob_segment_id] from enterprise_business_taxonomy WHERE [tree_level]='L2' AND [segment_name]=[L2 Business Segment], THEN lookup [facility_id] in facility_master WHERE IS([lob_segment_id]) — including all child L3 segments via parent_segment_id traversal. For each [facility_id]: compute facility-level DSCR (CRE: noi_amt, C&I/PF: ebitda_amt / total_debt_service_amt). Weighted average: SUM(facility.dscr * facility.gross_exposure_usd) / SUM(facility.gross_exposure_usd)

For each [L1 Business Segment], lookup [lob_segment_id] from enterprise_business_taxonomy WHERE [tree_level]='L1' AND [segment_name]=[L1 Business Segment], THEN lookup [facility_id] in facility_master WHERE IS([lob_segment_id]) — including all descendant L2/L3 segments via recursive parent_segment_id traversal. For each [facility_id]: compute facility-level DSCR (CRE: noi_amt, C&I/PF: ebitda_amt / total_debt_service_amt). Weighted average: SUM(facility.dscr * facility.gross_exposure_usd) / SUM(facility.gross_exposure_usd)

definition: Annualised probability that the obligor will default within 12 months. PD is inherently a counterparty-level attribute — all facilities under a single counterparty share the same PD. Sourced from internal rating model or counterparty_rating_observation. Basel III IRB regulatory floor is 0.03%.
insight: Annualised probability that the obligor will default within 12 months

ingredient_fields.description: Internal PD model output
Rating source — filter for INTERNAL
Fallback PD from counterparty master
Gross exposure — weighting basis for rollup
FK to counterparty
FK to enterprise_business_taxonomy

level_definitions.level_logic: For each DISTINCT(facility_id) THEN COALESCE(stressed_pd_pct, counterparty_rating_observation.pd_pct) WHERE rating_source_id = 'INTERNAL'. Basel floor: MAX(pd, 0.0003)
For each [counterparty_id] THEN SUM(facility.pd * facility.gross_exposure_usd) / SUM(facility.gross_exposure_usd) WHERE IS([counterparty_id])
For each [L3 Business Segment], SUM(facility.pd * facility.gross_exposure_usd) / SUM(facility.gross_exposure_usd) for all facilities WHERE IS([lob_segment_id])
For each [L2 Business Segment], SUM(facility.pd * facility.gross_exposure_usd) / SUM(facility.gross_exposure_usd) for all facilities under L2 segment including child L3 segments
For each [L1 Business Segment], SUM(facility.pd * facility.gross_exposure_usd) / SUM(facility.gross_exposure_usd) for all facilities under L1 department including all descendant segments

definition: Annualized gross interest income calculated as drawn (funded) balance multiplied by the all-in interest rate. Measures gross revenue generated from lending before deducting funding costs. Key input to NIM analysis, CCAR revenue projections, and FR Y-9C interest income reporting.
insight: Drawn (funded) balance multiplied by the all-in interest rate, annualized

ingredient_fields.description: Funded/outstanding balance on the facility
All-in interest rate (base rate + spread) as annual percentage
Primary key — links exposure and pricing snapshots to a single facility
FK linking facility to borrower — enables counterparty-level aggregation
FK to business taxonomy — enables desk/portfolio/Business Segment rollup
Hierarchy node PK for desk/portfolio/Business Segment tree
FK enabling recursive tree traversal for rollup hierarchy

level_definitions.level_logic: For each DISTINCT(facility_id) THEN lookup [drawn_amount] from L2.facility_exposure_snapshot WHERE IS([facility_id]) AND IS(MAX([as_of_date])), THEN lookup [all_in_rate_pct] from L2.facility_pricing_snapshot WHERE IS([facility_id]) AND IS(MAX([as_of_date])). For each [facility_id]: [drawn_amount] x [all_in_rate_pct] / 100
level_definitions.spec_formula: Average(Outstanding Amt * Interest Rate for each Position under the Facility ID)

level_definitions.level_logic: For each [counterparty_id] THEN lookup [facility_id] in facility_master WHERE IS([counterparty_id]). For each [facility_id]: lookup [drawn_amount] from L2.facility_exposure_snapshot WHERE IS([facility_id]) AND IS(MAX([as_of_date])), lookup [all_in_rate_pct] from L2.facility_pricing_snapshot WHERE IS([facility_id]) AND IS(MAX([as_of_date])). For each [counterparty_id] SUM(ARRAY{[drawn_amount] x [all_in_rate_pct] / 100})

For each [L3 LoB], lookup [lob_segment_id] from enterprise_business_taxonomy WHERE [tree_level]='L3' AND [segment_name]=[L3 LoB], THEN lookup [facility_id] in facility_master WHERE IS([lob_segment_id]). For each [facility_id]: lookup [drawn_amount] from L2.facility_exposure_snapshot WHERE IS([facility_id]) AND IS(MAX([as_of_date])), lookup [all_in_rate_pct] from L2.facility_pricing_snapshot WHERE IS([facility_id]) AND IS(MAX([as_of_date])). For each [L3 LoB] SUM(ARRAY{[drawn_amount] x [all_in_rate_pct] / 100})

source_references.description: FK to Business Segment taxonomy — desk resolution
Business Segment hierarchy node — L3 leaf segment

level_definitions.level_logic: For each [L2 Business Segment], lookup [lob_segment_id] from enterprise_business_taxonomy WHERE [tree_level]='L2' AND [segment_name]=[L2 Business Segment], THEN lookup [facility_id] in facility_master WHERE IS([lob_segment_id]) — including all child L3 segments via parent_segment_id traversal. For each [facility_id]: lookup [drawn_amount] from L2.facility_exposure_snapshot WHERE IS([facility_id]) AND IS(MAX([as_of_date])), lookup [all_in_rate_pct] from L2.facility_pricing_snapshot WHERE IS([facility_id]) AND IS(MAX([as_of_date])). For each [L2 Business Segment] SUM(ARRAY{[drawn_amount] x [all_in_rate_pct] / 100})

source_references.description: Business Segment hierarchy node — L2 parent segment
Self-referential FK — traverse up from L3 to L2

level_definitions.level_logic: For each [L1 Business Segment], lookup [lob_segment_id] from enterprise_business_taxonomy WHERE [tree_level]='L1' AND [segment_name]=[L1 Business Segment], THEN lookup [facility_id] in facility_master WHERE IS([lob_segment_id]) — including all descendant L2/L3 segments via recursive parent_segment_id traversal. For each [facility_id]: lookup [drawn_amount] from L2.facility_exposure_snapshot WHERE IS([facility_id]) AND IS(MAX([as_of_date])), lookup [all_in_rate_pct] from L2.facility_pricing_snapshot WHERE IS([facility_id]) AND IS(MAX([as_of_date])). For each [L1 Business Segment] SUM(ARRAY{[drawn_amount] x [all_in_rate_pct] / 100})

source_references.description: Business Segment hierarchy node — L1 root segment
Self-referential FK — recursive traversal to collect all descendants

spec_definition: Total interest earned on outstanding exposures during the reporting period.
spec_discrepancy_notes: FORMULA: Spec uses 'Average Balance x Interest Rate' (CCAR PPNR style); implementation uses point-in-time 'drawn_amount x all_in_rate_pct / 100' (monitoring snapshot). Aligning to avg_balance would require adding avg_balance_amt to facility_exposure_snapshot.
FACILITY_SOURCING: Spec labels facility as 'Aggregation'; correct type is 'Calc' (calculation from two inputs, not aggregation from children).
L3_DESK: Spec excludes L3 Desk; kept active for GSIB management reporting per Fed SR 15-18.
POSITION_GRAIN: Spec references position-level averaging ('each Position under the Facility ID'); current model calculates at facility grain using drawn_amount from facility_exposure_snapshot.

definition: Annualized gross interest expense calculated as drawn (funded) balance multiplied by the cost-of-funds rate assigned via Funds Transfer Pricing (FTP). Measures the internal funding cost the bank incurs to carry its lending portfolio. Key input to NIM analysis, CCAR stress testing, and FR Y-9C Schedule HI interest expense reporting.
insight: Drawn (funded) balance multiplied by the FTP cost-of-funds rate, annualized

ingredient_fields.description: Funded/outstanding balance on the facility
FTP cost-of-funds rate assigned by Treasury as annual percentage
Primary key — links exposure and pricing snapshots to a single facility
FK linking facility to borrower — enables counterparty-level aggregation
FK to business taxonomy — enables desk/portfolio/Business Segment rollup
Hierarchy node PK for desk/portfolio/Business Segment tree
FK enabling recursive tree traversal for rollup hierarchy

level_definitions.level_logic: For each DISTINCT(facility_id) THEN lookup [drawn_amount] from L2.facility_exposure_snapshot WHERE IS([facility_id]) AND IS(MAX([as_of_date])), THEN lookup [cost_of_funds_pct] from L2.facility_pricing_snapshot WHERE IS([facility_id]) AND IS(MAX([as_of_date])). For each [facility_id]: [drawn_amount] x [cost_of_funds_pct] / 100

For each [counterparty_id] THEN lookup [facility_id] in facility_master WHERE IS([counterparty_id]). For each [facility_id]: lookup [drawn_amount] from L2.facility_exposure_snapshot WHERE IS([facility_id]) AND IS(MAX([as_of_date])), lookup [cost_of_funds_pct] from L2.facility_pricing_snapshot WHERE IS([facility_id]) AND IS(MAX([as_of_date])). For each [counterparty_id] SUM(ARRAY{[drawn_amount] x [cost_of_funds_pct] / 100})

For each [L3 Business Segment], lookup [lob_segment_id] from enterprise_business_taxonomy WHERE [tree_level]='L3' AND [segment_name]=[L3 Business Segment], THEN lookup [facility_id] in facility_master WHERE IS([lob_segment_id]). For each [facility_id]: lookup [drawn_amount] from L2.facility_exposure_snapshot WHERE IS([facility_id]) AND IS(MAX([as_of_date])), lookup [cost_of_funds_pct] from L2.facility_pricing_snapshot WHERE IS([facility_id]) AND IS(MAX([as_of_date])). For each [L3 Business Segment] SUM(ARRAY{[drawn_amount] x [cost_of_funds_pct] / 100})

source_references.description: FK to Business Segment taxonomy — desk resolution
Business Segment hierarchy node — L3 leaf segment

level_definitions.level_logic: For each [L2 Business Segment], lookup [lob_segment_id] from enterprise_business_taxonomy WHERE [tree_level]='L2' AND [segment_name]=[L2 Business Segment], THEN lookup [facility_id] in facility_master WHERE IS([lob_segment_id]) — including all child L3 segments via parent_segment_id traversal. For each [facility_id]: lookup [drawn_amount] from L2.facility_exposure_snapshot WHERE IS([facility_id]) AND IS(MAX([as_of_date])), lookup [cost_of_funds_pct] from L2.facility_pricing_snapshot WHERE IS([facility_id]) AND IS(MAX([as_of_date])). For each [L2 Business Segment] SUM(ARRAY{[drawn_amount] x [cost_of_funds_pct] / 100})

source_references.description: Business Segment hierarchy node — L2 parent segment
Self-referential FK — traverse up from L3 to L2

level_definitions.level_logic: For each [L1 Business Segment], lookup [lob_segment_id] from enterprise_business_taxonomy WHERE [tree_level]='L1' AND [segment_name]=[L1 Business Segment], THEN lookup [facility_id] in facility_master WHERE IS([lob_segment_id]) — including all descendant L2/L3 segments via recursive parent_segment_id traversal. For each [facility_id]: lookup [drawn_amount] from L2.facility_exposure_snapshot WHERE IS([facility_id]) AND IS(MAX([as_of_date])), lookup [cost_of_funds_pct] from L2.facility_pricing_snapshot WHERE IS([facility_id]) AND IS(MAX([as_of_date])). For each [L1 Business Segment] SUM(ARRAY{[drawn_amount] x [cost_of_funds_pct] / 100})

source_references.description: Business Segment hierarchy node — L1 root segment
Self-referential FK — recursive traversal to collect all descendants

definition: Exposure-weighted average notch change in internal credit risk ratings. Measures the direction and magnitude of credit quality migration across the portfolio. Positive values indicate net deterioration (more downgrades); negative values indicate net improvement (more upgrades). Key input to CCAR stress scenario projections, CECL expected credit loss re-measurement, Basel III risk-weighted asset determination, and OCC credit quality examination.
insight: Exposure-weighted average notch change in internal risk ratings — negative means improvement, positive means deterioration

ingredient_fields.description: Current internal risk rating on a 1-5 scale (1=Minimal Risk, 5=High/Default)
Previous internal risk rating before the most recent review — the difference gives the notch change
Filter field — INTERNAL for bank's own ratings, EXTERNAL for agency ratings (S&P, Moody's, Fitch)
Total gross credit exposure in USD — used as the weighting factor for exposure-weighted averages
Primary key — links exposure snapshots to facilities
FK linking facility to borrower — enables counterparty-level aggregation and join to rating observations
FK to business taxonomy — enables desk/portfolio/Business Segment rollup
Hierarchy node PK for desk/portfolio/Business Segment tree
FK enabling recursive tree traversal for rollup hierarchy

level_definitions.level_logic: For each DISTINCT(facility_id), (rating_value - prior_rating_value) from counterparty_rating_observation joined through facility_master.counterparty_id, WHERE rating_type = 'INTERNAL'
For each [counterparty_id], SUM((rating_value - prior_rating_value) * gross_exposure_usd) / SUM(gross_exposure_usd) — exposure-weighted average notch change across all facilities
For each [L3 LoB], SUM(notch_change * gross_exposure_usd) / SUM(gross_exposure_usd) for all facilities WHERE lob_segment_id matches desk
For each [L2 Business Segment], exposure-weighted average including child L3 segments via parent_segment_id traversal
For each [L1 Business Segment], exposure-weighted average including all descendant L2/L3 segments via recursive parent_segment_id traversal

definition: Number of facilities with active policy exceptions divided by total facility count, expressed as a percentage. Measures the proportion of the loan book approved outside standard underwriting guidelines. A key credit risk governance KPI — elevated rates signal weakening credit standards and attract regulatory scrutiny under OCC Comptroller's Handbook, SR 11-7, and CCAR.
insight: Count of exception-flagged facilities divided by total active facilities, expressed as a percentage

ingredient_fields.description: Boolean indicating whether the facility was approved with a policy exception
Category of exception: LTV_BREACH, DSCR_BREACH, TENOR_BREACH, DOC_WAIVER, COVENANT_WAIVER, CONCENTRATION
Severity classification: MINOR, MAJOR, or CRITICAL — used to filter Material Exception Rate variant
Primary key — each active facility counts as one in the denominator
FK linking facility to borrower — enables counterparty-level pooled division
FK to business taxonomy — enables desk/portfolio/Business Segment rollup
Hierarchy node PK for desk/portfolio/Business Segment tree
FK enabling recursive tree traversal for rollup hierarchy

level_definitions.level_logic: For each DISTINCT(facility_id), CASE WHEN exception_flag = true THEN 100.00 ELSE 0.00 END — join facility_credit_approval on facility_id + as_of_date
For each [counterparty_id], COUNT(WHERE exception_flag = true) / COUNT(*) x 100 across all facilities WHERE counterparty_id matches — pooled division
For each [L3 LoB], COUNT(WHERE exception_flag = true) / COUNT(*) x 100 for all facilities WHERE lob_segment_id matches desk — pooled division
For each [L2 Business Segment], pool exception counts and facility counts across all child L3 segments via parent_segment_id traversal, then divide
For each [L1 Business Segment], pool exception counts and facility counts across all descendant L2/L3 segments via recursive parent_segment_id traversal, then divide

definition: Exposure allocated to specific counterparty representing their share of the facility which the client can draw on. Concentration KPI measuring obligor dependency risk.

ingredient_fields.description: Primary key — joins to participation table
FK linking facility to counterparty
Counterparty share of the facility

level_definitions.level_logic: For each [Facility_ID] lookup [Counterparty_ID] in Facility Master table THEN for each [Counterparty_ID] lookup [participation_pct] in facility_counterparty_participation table WHEN IS([Counterparty_ID] AND [Facility_ID])

For each [Counterparty_ID] lookup [Facility_ID] in Facility Master table THEN for each [Facility_ID] lookup [participation_pct] in facility_counterparty_participation table WHEN IS([Counterparty_ID] AND [Facility_ID])
Not applicable at desk level — allocation is facility-to-counterparty only
Not applicable at portfolio level — allocation is facility-to-counterparty only
Not applicable at lob level — allocation is facility-to-counterparty only

definition: Current market value of pledged collateral securing credit exposure in USD. Aggregated from individual collateral asset appraisals per facility, then participation-weighted at the counterparty level. Supports recovery analysis, secured lending assessment, Basel III CRM capital relief, and CCAR stress testing.
insight: Amount of credit risk mitigated by pledged collateral

ingredient_fields.description: Current market appraisal of each collateral asset in USD
FK linking collateral asset to the secured facility
Pre-computed SUM of current_valuation_usd from collateral_snapshot — materialized per facility for performance and audit trail
Counterparty ownership share in the facility — used for counterparty-level attribution
Primary key — links collateral snapshots and participation records to a single facility
FK linking facility to borrower — enables counterparty-level aggregation
FK to business taxonomy — enables desk/portfolio/Business Segment rollup
Hierarchy node PK for desk/portfolio/Business Segment tree
FK enabling recursive tree traversal for rollup hierarchy

level_definitions.level_logic: For each DISTINCT([Facility_ID]) WHEN [Facility_Active_Flag]='Y' AND IS(MAX([As_Of_Date])) Lookup each [Collateral_Snapshot_ID] FROM the Collateral_Snapshot table WHEN IS([Facility_ID]) THEN for each [Facility_ID] SUM(ARRAY{[current_valuation_usd]}) based on matched [Collateral_Snapshot_ID]

For each [Counterparty_ID] lookup [Facility_ID] in Facility Master table WHEN [Facility_Active_Flag]='Y' AND IS(MAX([As_Of_Date])) AND IS([Counterparty_ID]) THEN For each [Facility_ID] lookup [participation_pct] WHEN IS([Counterparty_ID]) AND IS([Facility_ID]) THEN For each [Facility_ID] select [total_collateral_mv_usd] from facility_exposure_snapshot THEN For each [Facility_ID] calculate [current_valuation_usd]*[participation_pct] == [Counterparty_Participation_Collateral_MV] THEN For each [Counterparty_ID] SUM(ARRAY{[Counterparty_Participation_Collateral_MV]})

For each [L3 LoB], lookup [Lob_segment_Id] from Enterprise_Business_Taxonomy master table WHEN [Tree_level]='L3' and [Description]=[L3 LoB], THEN lookup [Facility_ID] in Facility Master table WHEN IS([Lob_segment_ID]) AND [Facility_Active_Flag]='Y' AND IS(MAX([As_Of_Date])) THEN For each [Facility_ID] select [total_collateral_mv_usd] from facility_exposure_snapshot THEN For each [L3 LoB] SUM(ARRAY{[current_valuation_USD]})

For each [L2 LoB], lookup [Lob_segment_Id] from Enterprise_Business_Taxonomy master table WHEN [Tree_level]='L2' and [Description]=[L2 LoB], THEN lookup [Facility_ID] in Facility Master table WHEN IS([Lob_segment_ID]) AND [Facility_Active_Flag]='Y' AND IS(MAX([As_Of_Date])) THEN For each [Facility_ID] select [total_collateral_mv_usd] from facility_exposure_snapshot THEN For each [L2 LoB] SUM(ARRAY{[current_valuation_USD]})

For each [L1 LoB], lookup [Lob_segment_Id] from Enterprise_Business_Taxonomy master table WHEN [Tree_level]='L1' and [Description]=[L1 LoB], THEN lookup [Facility_ID] in Facility Master table WHEN IS([Lob_segment_ID]) AND [Facility_Active_Flag]='Y' AND IS(MAX([As_Of_Date])) THEN For each [Facility_ID] select [total_collateral_mv_usd] from facility_exposure_snapshot THEN For each [L1 LoB] SUM(ARRAY{[current_valuation_USD]})
